<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[hak:Yet-sṳ]][[ja:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[vi:Ất Tỵ]][[za:Ietceih]][[zh-min-nan:It-sū]][[zh-yue:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]]

'''Yin Wood Snake also known as Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 42nd combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Wood Dragon]] and followed by [[Yang Fire Horse]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] character [[Kinoto (乙)]] represents yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] character [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], forming a generating ([[Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

==Years of Yin Wood Snake==
Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Snake Years'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
*[[45]]
*[[105]]
*[[165]]
*[[225]]
*[[285]]
*[[345]]
*[[405]]
*[[465]]
*[[525]]
*[[585]]
*[[645]]
*[[705]]
*[[765]]
*[[825]]
*[[885]]
*[[945]]
|
*[[1005]]
*[[1065]]
*[[1125]]
*[[1185]]
*[[1245]]
*[[1305]]
*[[1365]]
*[[1425]]
*[[1485]]
*[[1545]]
*[[1605]]
*[[1665]]
*[[1725]]
*[[1785]]
*[[1845]]
*[[1905]]
*[[1965]]
|
*[[2025]]
*[[2085]]
*2145
*2205
*2265
*[[2325]]
*2385
*2445
*[[2505]]
*[[2565]]
*[[2625]]
*[[2685]]
*[[2745]]
*[[2805]]
*[[2865]]
*2925
*2985
|}

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by [[Emperor Tenji]] and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[645]] is known as the [[Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]].
* The [[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or [[Solar term]] (from [[Lixia]] to the day before [[Mangzhong]]).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the [[Tenitsu-shin]] cycle.
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly Stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]

{{wikidata link|Q905031}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
